response.justification: Over 15 years of full-stack engineering across a wide range of stacks, with recent hands-on TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB, and Kubernetes experience that maps closely to the role. The current position at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, which directly satisfies the AI agent requirement. The primary gap is no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are not named despite a demonstrably strong TDD culture.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience with React and AWS at Optilyz and re:cinq, matching the core stack closely
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq directly addresses the AI agent development requirement
Proven high-scale systems background (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby) and strong TDD/craftsmanship discipline across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin absent from the resume; Java appears briefly but is not a focus, leaving the secondary stack partially uncovered
Specific testing frameworks required by the role (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) are not named, even though TDD and custom test tooling are evident

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
